mapper.insert:
insert into his_mirror_consume_link ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, mirror_row_id, fetch_batch_id, dept_batch_consume_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, traceability_id, traceability_entry_id, write_off_dept_id, alloc_qty, dep_inventory_id, gz_dep_inventory_id, stk_dep_end_date, in_hospital_code, returned_qty, refundable_remaining_qty, create_time, del_flag ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.mirrorRowId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.traceabilityId}, #{e.traceabilityEntryId}, #{e.writeOffDeptId}, #{e.allocQty}, #{e.depInventoryId}, #{e.gzDepInventoryId}, #{e.stkDepEndDate}, #{e.inHospitalCode}, ifnull(#{e.returnedQty}, 0), #{e.refundableRemainingQty}, #{e.createTime}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0))
mapper.sql: greatest( ifnull(l.returned_qty, 0), coalesce(( select sum(abs(ifnull(re.qty, 0))) from t_hc_ks_xh_entry re inner join t_hc_ks_xh rh on rh.id = re.paren_id and ifnull(rh.del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(rh.reverse_flag, 0) = 1 where re.src_consume_entry_id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(re.del_flag, 0) = 0 and re.qty < 0 ), 0) )
mapper.select:
select distinct ifnull(h.bill_source, '') from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_id is not null and () > 0
union
select distinct 'HIS_MIRROR_ROW_HIGH' from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.traceability_id is not null and () > 0

select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.create_time as createTime, t.id as consumeBillId, t.trace_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(t.audit_date, t.create_time) as consumeBillDate, 'CONSUME' as recordType, 0 as reverseFlag, null as reverseOfBillNo, t.order_status as consumeBillStatus, te.id as consumeEntryId, te.material_name as materialName, coalesce(nullif(trim(te.specification), ''), nullif(trim(gm.speci), ''), nullif(trim(gdo.material_speci), ''), nullif(trim(m.speci), '')) as materialSpeci, coalesce(nullif(trim(te.model), ''), nullif(trim(gm.model), ''), nullif(trim(gdo.material_model), ''), nullif(trim(m.model), '')) as materialModel, coalesce(nullif(trim(te.unit), ''), nullif(trim(gu.unit_name), ''), nullif(trim(u.unit_name), '')) as unit, coalesce(nullif(trim(gdi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gdi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gdo.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(te.batch_no), '')) as batchNo, coalesce(nullif(trim(gdi.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gdi_c.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_number), ''), nullif(trim(goe.batch_number), ''), nullif(trim(gdo.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(te.batch_no), '')) as batchNumber, te.charge_price as unitPrice, coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) as entryQty, case when te.charge_price is not null and coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) is not null then te.charge_price * coalesce(l.alloc_qty, te.quantity) else null end as amt, coalesce(gdi.material_date, gdi_c.material_date, gse.begin_time, goe.begin_time, gdo.material_date) as beginTime, coalesce(goe.end_time, gse.end_time, te.expiry_date) as endTime, trim(ifnull(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code)) as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, t.write_off_dept_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.code as writeOffDeptCode, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' inner join gz_traceability_entry te on te.id = l.traceability_entry_id and ifnull(te.del_flag, 0) = 0 and te.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_dep_inventory gdi on gdi.id = coalesce(l.gz_dep_inventory_id, te.inventory_id) and gdi.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gdi.del_flag, 0) != 1 left join gz_dep_inventory gdi_c on gdi_c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gdi_c.del_flag, 0) != 1 and trim(ifnull(gdi_c.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) and trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) != '' left join gz_shipment_entry gse on ifnull(gse.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gse.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and trim(ifnull(gse.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) and trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) != '' left join gz_order_entry goe on ifnull(goe.del_flag, 0) != 1 and goe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and goe.batch_no = coalesce(nullif(trim(gdi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gdi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) left join gz_depot_inventory gdo on gdo.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gdo.del_flag, 0) != 1 and trim(ifnull(gdo.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) and trim(coalesce(te.in_hospital_code, l.in_hospital_code, '')) != '' left join fd_material gm on gm.id = coalesce(gdi.material_id, gdi_c.material_id, gse.material_id, gdo.material_id, te.material_id) left join fd_unit gu on gu.unit_id = gm.unit_id left join fd_material m on m.id = te.material_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, t.write_off_dept_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.traceability_id is not null
union all
select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, l.alloc_qty as allocQty, l.create_time as createTime, h.id as consumeBillId, h.consume_bill_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time, h.consume_bill_date) as consumeBillDate, 'CONSUME' as recordType, ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) as reverseFlag, h.reverse_of_bill_no as reverseOfBillNo, h.consume_bill_status as consumeBillStatus, e.id as consumeEntryId, e.material_name as materialName, coalesce(nullif(trim(e.material_speci), ''), nullif(trim(gm.speci), ''), nullif(trim(m.speci), '')) as materialSpeci, coalesce(nullif(trim(e.material_model), ''), nullif(trim(gm.model), ''), nullif(trim(m.model), '')) as materialModel, coalesce(nullif(trim(gu.unit_name), ''), nullif(trim(u.unit_name), '')) as unit, coalesce(nullif(trim(e.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) as batchNo, coalesce(nullif(trim(e.batch_number), ''), nullif(trim(gzi.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_number), '')) as batchNumber, e.unit_price as unitPrice, e.qty as entryQty, e.amt as amt, coalesce(e.begin_time, gzi.material_date, gzi_c.material_date, gse.begin_time, goe.begin_time) as beginTime, coalesce(e.end_time, goe.end_time, gse.end_time) as endTime, case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.code as writeOffDeptCode, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = l.dept_batch_consume_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 0 and h.bill_source in ('HIS_MIRROR_ROW_HIGH', 'HIS_MIRROR_ROW_LOW') left join t_hc_ks_xh_entry e on e.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(e.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join gz_dep_inventory gzi on gzi.id = coalesce(e.gz_dep_inventory_id, l.gz_dep_inventory_id) and gzi.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gzi.del_flag, 0) != 1 left join gz_dep_inventory gzi_c on gzi_c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gzi_c.del_flag, 0) != 1 and trim(ifnull(gzi_c.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end) and trim(case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end) != '' left join gz_shipment_entry gse on ifnull(gse.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gse.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and trim(ifnull(gse.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end) and trim(case when trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(e.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(e.sub_barcode, '')) end) != '' left join gz_order_entry goe on ifnull(goe.del_flag, 0) != 1 and goe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and goe.batch_no = coalesce(nullif(trim(gzi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) left join fd_material gm on gm.id = coalesce(gzi.material_id, gzi_c.material_id, gse.material_id, e.material_id) left join fd_unit gu on gu.unit_id = gm.unit_id left join fd_material m on m.id = e.material_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_id is not null

select l.id as linkId, l.visit_kind as visitKind, l.mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, abs(ifnull(re.qty, 0)) as allocQty, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time) as createTime, h.id as consumeBillId, h.consume_bill_no as consumeBillNo, coalesce(h.audit_date, h.create_time, h.consume_bill_date) as consumeBillDate, 'REVERSE' as recordType, 1 as reverseFlag, h.reverse_of_bill_no as reverseOfBillNo, h.consume_bill_status as consumeBillStatus, re.id as consumeEntryId, re.material_name as materialName, coalesce(nullif(trim(re.material_speci), ''), nullif(trim(gm.speci), ''), nullif(trim(m.speci), '')) as materialSpeci, coalesce(nullif(trim(re.material_model), ''), nullif(trim(gm.model), ''), nullif(trim(m.model), '')) as materialModel, coalesce(nullif(trim(gu.unit_name), ''), nullif(trim(u.unit_name), '')) as unit, coalesce(nullif(trim(re.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) as batchNo, coalesce(nullif(trim(re.batch_number), ''), nullif(trim(gzi.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.material_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_number), '')) as batchNumber, re.unit_price as unitPrice, re.qty as entryQty, re.amt as amt, coalesce(re.begin_time, gzi.material_date, gzi_c.material_date, gse.begin_time, goe.begin_time) as beginTime, coalesce(re.end_time, goe.end_time, gse.end_time) as endTime, case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end as inHospitalCode, coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) as writeOffDeptId, wod.code as writeOffDeptCode, wod.name as writeOffDeptName from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry fe on fe.id = l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id and ifnull(fe.del_flag, 0) = 0 and fe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id inner join t_hc_ks_xh_entry re on re.src_consume_entry_id = fe.id and ifnull(re.del_flag, 0) = 0 and re.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and re.qty < 0 inner join t_hc_ks_xh h on h.id = re.paren_id and ifnull(h.del_flag, 0) = 0 and h.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(h.reverse_flag, 0) = 1 left join gz_dep_inventory gzi on gzi.id = coalesce(re.gz_dep_inventory_id, l.gz_dep_inventory_id) and gzi.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gzi.del_flag, 0) != 1 left join gz_dep_inventory gzi_c on gzi_c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(gzi_c.del_flag, 0) != 1 and trim(ifnull(gzi_c.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end) and trim(case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end) != '' left join gz_shipment_entry gse on ifnull(gse.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gse.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and trim(ifnull(gse.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end) and trim(case when trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) != '' then trim(ifnull(re.main_barcode, '')) else trim(ifnull(re.sub_barcode, '')) end) != '' left join gz_order_entry goe on ifnull(goe.del_flag, 0) != 1 and goe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and goe.batch_no = coalesce(nullif(trim(gzi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gzi_c.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) left join fd_material gm on gm.id = coalesce(gzi.material_id, gzi_c.material_id, gse.material_id, re.material_id) left join fd_unit gu on gu.unit_id = gm.unit_id left join fd_material m on m.id = re.material_id left join fd_unit u on u.unit_id = m.unit_id left join fd_department wod on wod.id = coalesce(l.write_off_dept_id, h.department_id) where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and l.visit_kind = #{visitKind} and l.mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.dept_batch_consume_entry_id is not null

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, traceability_id as traceabilityId, traceability_entry_id as traceabilityEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, gz_dep_inventory_id as gzDepInventoryId, stk_dep_end_date as stkDepEndDate, in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty, create_time as createTime from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = #{visitKind} and mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and coalesce(refundable_remaining_qty, alloc_qty - ifnull(returned_qty, 0)) > 0
and dep_inventory_id is not null
and gz_dep_inventory_id is not null
mapper.update: update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}, refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - (ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = least(ifnull(alloc_qty, 0), ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}), refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - least(ifnull(alloc_qty, 0), ifnull(returned_qty, 0) + #{delta}), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where dept_batch_consume_entry_id = #{srcConsumeEntryId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

update his_mirror_consume_link set returned_qty = @new_ret := greatest(0, ifnull(returned_qty, 0) - #{delta}), refundable_remaining_qty = ifnull(alloc_qty, 0) - @new_ret, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, traceability_id as traceabilityId, traceability_entry_id as traceabilityEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, gz_dep_inventory_id as gzDepInventoryId, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 limit 1

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, visit_kind as visitKind, mirror_row_id as mirrorRowId, fetch_batch_id as fetchBatchId, dept_batch_consume_id as deptBatchConsumeId, dept_batch_consume_entry_id as deptBatchConsumeEntryId, alloc_qty as allocQty, dep_inventory_id as depInventoryId, returned_qty as returnedQty, refundable_remaining_qty as refundableRemainingQty, create_time as createTime from his_mirror_consume_link where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = #{visitKind} and mirror_row_id = #{mirrorRowId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and dep_inventory_id is not null order by create_time asc, id asc
